operations.create: Supported through API-key inline or GitHub URL submission; the backend upserts the skill from the manifest.
operations.update: Supported by submitting a new immutable version with the same slug and a bumped semver.
operations.upload: Supported as inline files or public GitHub URL through the API-key flow; zip upload is available through the authenticated page flow.
operations.delete: Not available in the MVP API-key flow; prepare an admin/product deprecation request until a dedicated endpoint exists.

xapiDependencies.purpose: Read the current skill package constraints and API-key scopes.
Submit local skill files with an xAPI API key.
Submit a public GitHub repository or tree URL for review.
Check review and publish status for submitted skill versions.

examples.title: Create a new skill
examples.prompt: Create a marketplace skill for our Twitter research workflow and write the xapi.skill.json manifest.

examples.title: Submit by API key
examples.prompt: Validate this skill folder and submit it to xAPI with my configured API key.

examples.title: Import from GitHub
examples.prompt: Submit this public GitHub skill URL to the xAPI Skill Marketplace review pipeline.
